diagrams.title: Fluoride Concentration Effects Scale
diagrams.description: Shows health effects at different fluoride concentrations in water
diagrams.purpose: Understand safe limits and health impacts at various fluoride levels

diagrams.title: Defluoridation Methods Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows different defluoridation techniques with their effectiveness and applications
elements: Nalgonda: 70-80% removal, low cost for communities
diagrams.purpose: Compare methods for selecting appropriate defluoridation technology

diagrams.title: Fluoride Entry into Groundwater
diagrams.description: Illustrates natural process of fluoride leaching into water sources

diagrams.title: Dental vs Skeletal Fluorosis
diagrams.description: Shows the difference between dental and skeletal fluorosis effects
elements: Dental: Teeth with white spots, brown stains, pitting
Skeletal: Bone structure with calcification, joint stiffness
Age groups affected: Dental (children 1-4 years), Skeletal (adults with prolonged exposure)
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between types of fluorosis and their manifestations

visuals.title: Fluoride Problem In Drinking Water
visuals.description: Visual diagram for fluoride problem in drinking water
